project.name: Standard Entity
project.summary: Standard Entity is a TypeScript protocol package for structural, type-safe entity interoperability across libraries without direct library coupling.
goals: Provide the @sylphx/standard-entity package, protocol marker, type helpers, type guard, README contract, and tests.
Allow entity producers and consumers to interoperate through structural typing without direct imports.
Keep package release evidence, public exports, and documentation aligned.
nonGoals: Own Lens, Reify, or downstream product entity models.
Encode consumer-specific persistence, validation, UI, workflow, or commercial behavior into the protocol package.
Publish package changes without CI proof and npm registry readback.

owns.name: standard-entity-protocol
owns.description: The structural ~entity marker, StandardEntity interface, inference helpers, type guard, README contract, tests, and package metadata.

doesNotOwn: Downstream entity libraries, product data models, persistence schemas, validators, UI behavior, or workflow semantics.
Enterprise doctrine, organization reusable workflow internals, or package registry infrastructure.
Consumer-specific compatibility shims outside the published protocol contract.
forbiddenCouplings: Do not import or depend on Lens, Reify, or any consumer repository internals.
Do not add product-specific entity behavior to the shared protocol.
Do not publish package changes from a personal token or without registry readback.

delivery.deployPath: No hosted deploy path is declared. Package release runs from main through .github/workflows/release.yml using the organization reusable release workflow.
delivery.productionProof: ci workflow pass, release workflow completion for package publication, and npm registry readback for @sylphx/standard-entity.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: The repository publishes the public @sylphx/standard-entity package through the repo-local release workflow.
packageRelease.versionPr: Release/version changes are owned by the organization reusable release workflow and package release automation.
packageRelease.publisher: .github/workflows/release.yml with inherited organization secrets and npm publish credentials.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm registry readback for @sylphx/standard-entity after a release workflow publishes a changed version.

commercial.metricsSourceOfTruth: npm registry/readback and consuming product metrics, not this repository
guardrails: Commercial packaging and pricing decisions belong to consuming products unless a future ADR changes this package's posture.

gaps.description: Repository still uses a legacy CI workflow and has not adopted ADR-29 admission fan-in contexts.
Package release proof should be reconciled with ADR-59 package release control-plane expectations when release automation is next changed.
